case_title: SOPHIE LAU VS. JOSET BALARIC JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LAU, SOPHIE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JOSET BALARIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
